name: Mushroom Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Margarine, divided           1/4 cup Tomato paste
1 cup Carrot, finely chopped              2 teaspoons Parsley flakes or
1 cup Celery, finely chopped             1/4 cup Fresh parsley, minced
1 cup Onion, finely chopped               1 Bay leaf
1 clove Garlic, minced                    1/2 teaspoon Ground pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash mushrooms and slice half of them; set aside.
2. Chop the remaining mushrooms and sauté in 1 tablespoon margarine in a large pot.
3. Add all vegetables (except sliced mushrooms) and cook for 6-7 minutes, stirring often.
4. Stir in all other ingredients except the mushrooms, remaining margarine, and sherry.
5. Simmer, covered, for 1 hour.
6. Puree soup in blender or food processor fitted with steel blade.
7. Sauté sliced mushrooms in remaining tablespoon margarine.
8. Return pureed soup to pot; add sautéed mushrooms and sherry. Reheat over moderate heat, stirring.
Food Exchanges per serving: 2 VEGETABLES EXCHANGES + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CHO: 12g; PRO: 5g; FAT: 5g; CAL: 108;
Low-sodium diets: Omit salt. Substitute unsalted beef broth and unsalted margarine.
Source: The Art of Cooking for the Diabetic by Mary Abbott Hess, R.D., M.S. and Katharine Middleton
